metaDescription: Safe hornet nest removal in NYC. Bald-faced hornets and more. Same-day emergency service. Licensed exterminators. Starting at $150. Call now.
h1: Hornet Removal in NYC — Fast, Safe, and Guaranteed
heroParagraph: Hornets are significantly more aggressive than wasps and will defend their nest vigorously against any perceived threat. Bald-faced hornets — the large black-and-white species common in NYC — build conspicuous gray paper nests in trees, shrubs, and under eaves. By late summer these nests can contain hundreds of workers. Do not attempt removal yourself. We handle hornet nests with full protective equipment and the right products, often in a single visit.
